UHA-20  SCOPE. (a) This Part covers additional requirements for pressure vessels and vessel parts fabricated from high alloy steel (austenitic stainless steel, duplex stainless steel, and precipitation-hardened alloys). (b) The requirements of this Part are supplementary to the general requirements of Part UG and shall be used in conjunction with UG-16 through UG-125. Welding of high alloy steels shall comply with UHA-32 and the welding qualification requirements of QW-200. For material specifications, see UG-80. Stress values shall be as specified in UHA-23. Refer to UHA-51 for examination requirements.
